channel.title: Comments on: The Design Thinking Process

item.title: By: Jermaine Pleas
item.dc:creator: Jermaine Pleas
item.description: Hi Gautam Focusing on the core customer values have always been my goal, to give what they want. Each design should cater to the customer, the mission indeed. Awesome post.
item.content:encoded: Hi Gautam Focusing on the core customer values have always been my goal, to give what they want. Each design should cater to the customer, the mission indeed. Awesome post.
